title: Agent performance and stats tracking
description: How WagerProof tracks your AI Agent's pick results including W-L-P, units, and ROI.

content.text: Every pick your AI Agent makes is automatically graded once the game finishes. WagerProof tracks comprehensive performance metrics so you can evaluate your agents objectively.

items: +/- units tracking based on each pick's unit size.
Performance breakdowns by sport, bet type (spread, moneyline, totals), and time period.

content.text: Once a game is final, the system checks the agent's pick against the actual result using the line at the time the pick was generated. Wins, losses, and pushes are recorded automatically -- no manual input needed.
Go to your agent's detail page to see its full performance history. You'll see the overall record, recent picks with results, and performance trends over time.
Give your agent at least 20-30 picks before judging its performance. Small sample sizes can be misleading.
